system_scope_12v_check.recommendation: Check battery disconnect switch and main power connections

ac_cross_check.recommendation: Check main power supply and battery connections

measure_battery_voltage.recommendation: Charge or replace the house battery immediately

charging_response_check.description: Charging system not raising battery voltage

symptom_based_fallback.recommendation: Check battery voltage and charging system

battery_connection_observation.description: Battery cables appear loose or heavily corroded
battery_connection_observation.recommendation: Clean and tighten battery cable connections

disconnect_position_check.recommendation: Turn the battery disconnect switch to the ON position

fuse_visual_check.description: Blown fuse or tripped breaker detected
fuse_visual_check.recommendation: Identify and replace the blown fuse or reset the tripped breaker

scope_check.description: Partial 12V power loss - specific circuits affected
scope_check.recommendation: Check individual circuit fuses and breakers for affected items

city_source_check.description: City water spigot is off or has no pressure
city_source_check.recommendation: Turn on water at the spigot and verify pressure

city_hose_kink_check.description: Water hose has kinks or loose connections
city_hose_kink_check.recommendation: Straighten hose kinks and secure all connections

city_inlet_check.description: Leak or spraying water observed at city water inlet
city_inlet_check.recommendation: Turn off spigot immediately and check inlet connection

city_mode_position_check.description: Water system not set to NORMAL or CITY mode
city_mode_position_check.recommendation: Set water system valve to NORMAL or CITY mode

city_filter_regulator_check.description: Low flow with pressure regulator or filter present
city_filter_regulator_check.recommendation: Check or replace water pressure regulator or inline filter

tank_air_spit_check.description: Air spitting from faucets - tank low or air in lines
tank_air_spit_check.recommendation: Check tank level and prime water system

pump_switch_check_tank.recommendation: Turn the water pump switch to the ON position

pump_sound_check.description: Water pump not running when switch is ON
pump_sound_check.recommendation: Run the Electrical diagnostic to check power supply to the pump

pump_behavior_check.description: Water pump runs continuously without stopping
pump_behavior_check.recommendation: Check for leaks in the water system or faulty pressure switch

pump_fuse_observed.description: Pump fuse blown or breaker tripped
pump_fuse_observed.recommendation: Replace pump fuse or reset breaker after checking for cause

propane_odor_present_check.recommendation: Evacuate immediately and contact emergency services

propane_level_known_check.description: Propane tank fuel level unknown or suspected empty
propane_level_known_check.recommendation: Check propane tank gauge or refill tank

tank_valve_position_check.description: Propane tank service valve is closed
tank_valve_position_check.recommendation: Open the propane tank valve fully

system_wide_recent_working_check.description: System-wide propane issue - no appliances working
system_wide_recent_working_check.recommendation: Check propane supply line and main regulator

stove_behavior_check.recommendation: Check stove igniter battery and gas flow to burners

water_heater_behavior_check.description: Water heater not operating on propane
water_heater_behavior_check.recommendation: Check water heater propane mode setting and ignition

furnace_behavior_check.recommendation: Check furnace thermostat and propane ignition system

refrigerator_behavior_check.description: Refrigerator not operating on propane mode
refrigerator_behavior_check.recommendation: Check refrigerator propane mode setting and operation

slide_no_movement_check.description: Slide shows no response to control command
slide_no_movement_check.recommendation: Check slide control power and interlock conditions

slide_partial_movement_check.description: Slide stops at same point each time
slide_partial_movement_check.recommendation: Check for obstructions or binding in slide mechanism

slide_uneven_movement_check.description: One side of slide moves differently than the other
slide_uneven_movement_check.recommendation: Check slide synchronization system and alignment

slide_noise_check.description: Slide makes grinding, popping, or banging noises
slide_noise_check.recommendation: Stop operation and check for mechanical binding or damage

slide_power_interlock_check.description: Slide control panel shows warning or interlock message
slide_power_interlock_check.recommendation: Check interlock conditions and record warning message

leveling_no_start_check.description: Leveling system shows no response to start command
leveling_no_start_check.recommendation: Check leveling system power supply and control panel

leveling_partial_cycle_check.description: Leveling system stops at same point each attempt
leveling_partial_cycle_check.recommendation: Check leveling sensors and interlock conditions

leveling_accuracy_issue.description: Control panel shows level but RV feels unlevel
leveling_accuracy_issue.recommendation: Check leveling sensor calibration and accuracy

leveling_interlock_check.description: Leveling control panel shows interlock warning
leveling_interlock_check.recommendation: Check interlock conditions and record warning message
